title: Slay the Spire 2's Ancients can totally transform your run, and they include the first game's most friendly face
author: editor@pcgamesn.com
contents:
Slay the Spire 2 might have been delayed, but developer Mega Crit continues to sate my appetite with plenty of new details about the successor to one of the best roguelikes of all time. Its new blog is all about Ancients, powerful beings that have the ability to dramatically alter the course of your playthrough. We're already very familiar with one of them: Neow, Mother of Resurrection, the giant whale that greets you with a choice of buffs at the start of every Slay the Spire run. In the sequel, however, we'll be meeting several of her fellow Ancients, each of whom will offer blessings.

Read the rest of the story...
